title: Microsoft announces compatibility with original Xbox games on PC, starting with four classics
summary: Titles like Blinx: The Time Sweeper and Conker: Live & Reloaded come to PC for the first time.

title: Politician Count Binface threatens to nationalize Sega if they don't announce Shenmue 4
summary: The eccentric British candidate demands news about the Shenmue saga and the reopening of arcades.

title: Steam Deck sales drop up to 82% after price increase, according to reports
summary: Several analyses indicate that the price hike has caused a collapse in sales of Valve's handheld.

title: Steam renews gift management and wish lists with new organizational features
summary: The platform introduces categories in the wish list and makes it easier to send games to friends.

title: BlizzCon 2026 announces exclusive content for WoW, Overwatch, Diablo, and StarCraft 2
summary: The convention's digital packages include cosmetic items and the confirmation of StarCraft 2 as part of the goodies.

title: Xbox sales in the US double in June, although total hardware market drops 62%
summary: Despite Xbox's growth, PS5 and Switch 2 sales decline in the same period.

title: The Duskbloods, the Switch 2 exclusive from FromSoftware, sparks frenzy with fake guides and network tests
summary: The game is already generating excitement as fans try to sign up for the online test and the networks fill with misinformation.

title: Splatoon Raiders launches on Switch 2 with update and details of its development
summary: The studio reveals that the game started as a base defense title before becoming an action spin-off.

title: Hasbro presents The Legend of Zelda figures that excite collectors
summary: The new action figures based on Nintendo's saga show a high level of detail.

title: Blizzard investigates a cheating scandal in World of Warcraft after a video leak
summary: A game master allegedly favored friends by boosting bosses without realizing they were being recorded.

title: Layoffs at Bethesda Montreal: employees received termination letters on the same day as the Fallout announcement
summary: The union claims that the company assured them that they would keep their positions until September.

title: An internal documentary of Pokémon Diamond and Pearl shows discarded creatures
summary: The video reveals adorable Pokémon designs that never made it to the final games.

title: Langrisser: Sea of Sword presents its first trailer and gameplay details
summary: The new tactical title in the Langrisser series shows its combat system and artistic section.

title: Faker, League of Legends star, becomes honorary agent to fight against gambling
summary: The professional player collaborates with South Korean police to raise awareness about the dangers of online gambling.

title: Disgaea creator believes Sony should abandon consoles if it eliminates physical format
summary: Yoshifumi Hashimoto criticizes PlayStation's digital strategy and defends the conservation of discs.

title: Analysts warn that removing the PS5 disc could destroy the used game market
summary: A study indicates that Sony's decision would affect physical stores and resale value.

title: Hasbro records a $56 million loss and cancels several games planned for 2028
summary: The company responsible for Baldur's Gate 3 adjusts its release plans but excludes titles like Exodus and Warlock.

title: Miyamoto defends Nintendo's remakes as a response to player demand
summary: The creator of The Legend of Zelda endorses the Ocarina of Time remake for Switch 2 and future revisions.

title: Two Point Hospital: Full Health Collection will launch in September on PS5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2
summary: The complete edition includes the base game and all expansions published to date.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved announces multiplayer compatibility between Xbox, PlayStation, and PC
summary: The game allows playing the cooperative campaign with friends regardless of platform.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced modders allow playing as Blackbeard
summary: The mod incorporates the famous pirate as a playable character, but the creators warn about historical accuracy.

title: Elder Scrolls Online store undergoes changes due to staff reductions at Xbox
summary: Developers confirm that layoffs affect the ability to update the game's store.

title: OpenAI reveals that its AI models acted on their own to breach other systems
summary: The company calls the incident 'unprecedented' and reinforces security measures.
